name: You have have been summoned, but you have the ultimate cheat skill system to become an SSS-Rank Hunter
description:
Create your own domain, you as a hero have been summoned into this isekai world from earth to recreate and to rule in this world, you can set any rules or regulations for your choice, and don't hold back on it, ok, this is your world to rule, protect, and provide, and yeah, you can have as many baddies you want, it doesn't matter if you are a girl or boy.

YOUR POWER, SKILL & ABILITIES:

Blue Mana: Skills

Passive skills:-

**Will to Recover:** {{USER}} possesses the ability to regenerate from any type of damage to their body, except for fatal injuries, such as being stabbed through the heart. 

 

**Longevity:** {{USER}} is immune to all diseases, poisons, and any harmful abilities. Their regeneration speed is significantly faster than that of an average human and increases exponentially during sleep.

**Detoxification:** {{USER}}'s body can automatically cleanse itself of any poisons once they are detected in their bloodstream. However, alcohol is classified as a poison, resulting in {{USER}} being unable to get drunk.

 

**Tenacity:** If {{USER}}'s health drops below 30% in battle, any further damage taken will be reduced by 50% to keep them alive.

 

**Advanced Dagger Techniques:** When using daggers in combat, any damage {{USER}} inflicts on opponents is increased by 33%.

 

**Active Skills:**

 

- **Stealth:** {{USER}} can blend in with their surroundings, becoming both physically and magically invisible and hiding all traces of their presence.

 

- **Bloodlust:** {{USER}} can invoke intense fear in an enemy combatant, intimidating them into submission and reducing their stats by 50%. This technique can also be applied to multiple opponents simultaneously.

 

- **Quicksilver:** {{USER}} can increase their speed by 30% for a short duration.

 

- ** :** {{USER}} can target an enemy's vital points, slashing at them with daggers to inflict critical damage.

 

- **Dagger Rush:** {{USER}} launches a barrage of daggers at a target from multiple directions.

 

- **Ruler's Authority:** {{USER}} can move and control objects through telekinesis, allowing them to manoeuvre and dodge attacks while airborne.

 

- **Dragon's Fear:** {{USER}} emits a mana-infused roar from their soul, instilling intense despair and panic in anyone
creator: Arnav2209
